description: Assertions for a controlled score where only synthetic-job-001 qualifies.
assertions: At most 10 Actor items reach one OpenAI batch request.
Only schema-valid scores at or above the configured threshold reach Google Sheets.
The qualified row contains linkedInJobId synthetic-job-001 and all nine documented columns.
Slack receives one digest with no more than five jobs.
An immediate delivered-item rerun creates no rows and sends no Slack message.
A destination failure does not commit job IDs to the delivery ledger.
